subject.description: Young Asian woman, casual everyday aesthetic, wearing form-fitting knitwear.

face.makeup: Light East Asian beauty style, dewy glass-skin base, soft peach lips, subtle contour.

hair.style: Tied up/back, soft wispy curtain bangs framing the face.

body.waist: Narrow, cinched appearance due to pose.
body.chest: Full, heavily emphasized by tight fabric.
body.legs: Not fully visible, thighs covered by tight dress.

skin.texture: Smooth, natural skin texture with visible pores.
skin.lighting_effect: Harsh overhead fluorescent light creating soft highlights on collarbones.

pose.base: Weight shifted slightly, hip jutted out.
pose.overall: Both arms raised, hands tucked behind the back of the neck/head. Torso stretched upward.

top.details: Ribbed knit material, extreme form-fitting, braless.

accessories.prop: Metal shopping cart directly beside her, containing a large yellow plush toy.

photography.lighting: Harsh overhead rectangular fluorescent commercial lights.
photography.depth_of_field: Moderate bokeh, blurring the background slightly.

the_vibe.authenticity: High candid feel, imperfect commercial lighting.
the_vibe.story: She was casually stretching her arms while riding the escalator in a store.
the_vibe.caption_energy: Late night grocery run. / Just stretching.

must_keep: Tight beige ribbed dress with visible chest contours

subject.description: Young East Asian fashion model, high-fashion editorial aesthetic.

eyes.look: Piercing, intense look directly into lens.

hair.effect: No loose strands, clean structured silhouette.

body.frame: Fashion model, very slender, long limbs.
body.legs: Long, athletic legs emphasized by high-heeled boots.

skin.lighting_effect: Strong directional key light from top left creates sharp shadows on cheekbones and clavicles.

photography.lighting: High-contrast studio lighting, hard key light (Beauty Dish), clean soft fill, deep controlled shadows.
photography.depth_of_field: Deep focus, entire outfit from earrings to boots is tack sharp.

elements: Cast shadow of the subject on the background wall

the_vibe.story: Modeling for a luxury designer's winter collection catalog.
